Home.title: Your Health, Verified & Protected.
Home.subtitle: India's open-source citizen platform to instantly verify medicine authenticity, find safe pharmacies, and receive critical health alerts.
Home.scan_subtitle: Point camera at packaging or barcode
Home.ai_health_assistant_description: Get instant health advice, symptom checking & prescription guidance
Home.alerts_empty_description: No active regulatory alerts right now. Stay safe and verify your medicines.

VoicePage.title: AI Voice Triage
VoicePage.subtitle: Speak your symptoms in your local language. SahiDawa AI will help you understand next steps.
VoicePage.streaming_fallback_hint: Connection is unstable. SahiDawa will finish processing after you stop speaking.
VoicePage.processing_subtitle: Checking your symptoms with SahiDawa AI…
VoicePage.review_message: The microphone picked up your symptoms with low confidence. You can retry for a clearer result or analyse this transcript anyway.
VoicePage.emergency_body: These symptoms may need urgent care. Call 112 or 108 right away, or go to the nearest emergency facility.
VoicePage.disclaimer: This guidance is for informational use only and is not a diagnosis. Consult a doctor or pharmacist, especially for severe or worsening symptoms.
VoicePage.stop_listening_aria: Listening for symptoms. Tap to stop.
VoicePage.footer_note: Voice guidance is informative only. For serious symptoms, please consult a licensed doctor immediately.
VoicePage.share_failure: Unable to share the report right now
VoicePage.tts_not_supported: Your browser does not support text-to-speech
VoicePage.tts_fallback_message: Your browser may read this summary aloud in a different voice because {language} text-to-speech support is limited.
VoicePage.fallback_summary: SahiDawa could not structure the response clearly. Please consult a doctor if your symptoms continue.

share_report.title: SahiDawa Voice Triage Report
share_report.default_recommendation: Follow the advice of a doctor or pharmacist.

errors.unsupported_message: This browser does not support speech recognition yet. Please try Chrome or Edge.
errors.language_not_supported_title: This browser cannot capture that voice language
errors.language_not_supported_message: {language} voice input is limited in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge, or start a new check with another voice language.
errors.permission_message: Please allow microphone permission in your browser settings and try again.
errors.microphone_message: Check that your microphone is connected and available to this browser tab.
errors.network_message: Your browser could not finish the voice capture. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.no_speech_title: We could not hear any speech
errors.no_speech_message: Try again in a quieter place or speak a little closer to the microphone.
errors.generic_message: We could not process your voice input this time. Please try again.
errors.service_unavailable_message: Our voice servers are currently under heavy load. Please try again or type your symptoms instead.
errors.timeout_message: The voice service is taking longer than expected. Please try again or switch to text input.
errors.api_message: We could not get medical guidance right now. Please try again in a moment.

offline.descriptionOffline: Your changes will sync when connection returns
offline.title: Offline Mode
offline.description: You don't have an internet connection right now.
offline.subtitle: Some features are unavailable while offline. Try to connect to the internet or browse cached content.
offline.footer: SahiDawa will automatically sync when your connection returns.
offline.cachedContent: You can still access previously loaded content
offline.noCache: This page was not cached and is not available offline

contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions, ideas, or want to contribute? We would love to hear from you.

email.title: Email Us
email.description: For privacy queries, partnerships, or serious concerns.

discord.title: Discord Community
discord.description: Join contributors, ask questions, and get announcements.

bug.title: Report a Bug
bug.description: Found an issue? Open a GitHub issue and we will fix it fast.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: Want to help build SahiDawa? Read our contributing guide.

contact.footer: SahiDawa is free, open-source, and built for 1.4 billion Indians. No ads. No premium. No data sold. Ever.
